_comment: official publisher-CDN only, name-bearing, viewed+server-side-verified; games without a qualifying official asset are omitted (placeholder) pending better sources. Allowed hosts ONLY: blz-contentstack-images.akamaized.net + bnetcmsus-a.akamaihd.net (Blizzard/Activision), cmsassets.rgpub.io (Riot). Every URL returns HTTP 200 image/* >5KB via a plain Mozilla User-Agent fetch AND was visually confirmed to carry the game's legible name/logo. Keys MUST match the exact GameName strings produced by BattleNetMappingService (rust-processor/tact_products.json) and the Riot service. Loaded at runtime by GameImageFetchService via Assembly.GetManifestResourceStream("LancacheManager.game_banners.json").
